topic.what: behavior-based rootkit detection using n-gram analysis of API call sequences with Gini impurity-based feature selection
topic.how: extracts bigram/trigram API call sequences from sandbox execution, applies machine learning classifiers with optimized feature selection achieving up to 97.81% accuracy
topic.why_matters: rootkits evade static/signature-based detection through metamorphic behavior; dynamic API sequence analysis provides robust detection without relying on static signatures

characteristics.what_it_measures: detection accuracy of rootkit classifier on test set
characteristics.evidence: Table 1 Random Forest bigram on 30% test set
characteristics.context: Random Forest achieves highest accuracy among classifiers tested
Random Forest on reduced feature set 483 features from 68442
